description: Composition Black sheer shirt made of a blended fabric with a soft drape, has a round neck, full buttoned placket, two patch pockets on the chest, three quarter sleeves, concealed buttoned placket and a dropped hem at the back Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Dry inside out Do not bleach or wring Warm iron Strikingly chic, reminiscent of a vintage vibe, this flowy shirt from femella is a detail-oriented deconstruction of a wardrobe essential. Pared down to the basics, with a draped, clingy silhouette, pair this with a pencil skirt and pumps. For a formal or casual feel wear this with denims or formal pants. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
